author: SantiMod
content:
Please take a moment during your daily interstellar voyages to cast a VOTE and help StarAtlas.com win the Site of the Year award!  

Log in at the website below with your Twitter account, and then click the below link again to go directly to the Star Atlas voting page:
https://annual.awwwards.com/siteoftheyear-nominees/star-atlas 

You're also welcome to share your vote on Twitter/Facebook/LinkedIn. You can win 2 tickets for the Awwwards Conference for picking up the prize!  

Thank you - let's do this!
